products.name: CA Fleet
products.shortDescription: Cloud-based fleet management solution that consolidates job management, compliance, and operational control into one connected, data-driven platform with real-time visibility across vehicles and drivers.
products.overview: CA Fleet is a comprehensive digital platform designed to modernize transport and fleet management operations. It consolidates job management, compliance tracking, and operational control into a single integrated system, enabling organizations to transition from manual, paper-based processes to connected, data-driven fleet operations while maintaining real-time visibility across all vehicles and drivers.
targetCustomers: Construction firms with vehicle and equipment fleets
Property management companies running service vehicles
Cleaning services and plumbing service fleets
products.businessProblem: Manual, paper-based fleet operations cause regulatory non-compliance (Chain of Responsibility, WHS), poor accountability for driver actions and incidents, unexpected breakdowns and maintenance costs, untracked fuel and expense waste, and limited real-time visibility into fleet performance.
keyFeatures: Alerts & Compliance Management — driver licence, registration and document expiry alerts; automated warnings to prevent fines and legal risk
Driver Allocation & Responsibility Tracking — driver-vehicle assignments with timestamps, historical allocation records, and audit trails
Fleet Condition Reporting — real-time mobile vehicle inspections with photos, notes, and instant submission from the field
Expense Management — fleet-wide expense tracking with categorization (fuel, repairs, tolls) and real-time spend visibility
Repair & Maintenance Tracking — service scheduling, history, and automated maintenance reminders
Fuel Tracking & Optimization — usage and consumption trends, per-vehicle fuel cost analysis, anomaly detection
Document Management — centralized, secure document storage accessible from web and mobile
Custom eForms — configurable safety checklists, incident reports, and inspection forms with mobile submission
Dashboard & Real-Time Visibility — centralized dashboard with live performance insights and role-based access
advancedFeatures: Anomaly detection on fuel consumption patterns
businessBenefits: Ensures regulatory compliance and avoids penalties
Establishes clear accountability for incidents and violations
Reduces unexpected breakdowns through proactive maintenance
Extends fleet lifespan and improves safety compliance
Identifies cost leakages and supports budget optimization
Eliminates manual paperwork and administrative errors
Enables data-driven coordination and decision-making
useCases: Transport companies verifying driver compliance before dispatch
Banking fleet teams managing field-officer safety and legality
Cleaning companies tracking vehicle damage accountability
Construction firms monitoring equipment-operator responsibility
Property managers ensuring service-vehicle availability
Agriculture businesses monitoring farm-vehicle conditions
Factories identifying high-expense vehicles
Plumbing services tracking job-specific vehicle costs
Logistics operators optimizing fuel usage across routes

products.name: CA Workforce
products.shortDescription: Enterprise workforce management platform centralizing HR operations, attendance, scheduling, and task management — giving organizations clarity, structure, and real-time control over their teams.
products.overview: CA Workforce is an enterprise workforce management system designed to provide clarity, structure, and real-time control for managing employees. The platform centralizes HR operations, attendance tracking, scheduling, and task management into a unified digital system, helping organizations move from manual processes to automated, data-driven workflows.
targetCustomers: Manufacturing companies managing hundreds of workers
products.businessProblem: Manual HR administration, attendance errors, payroll inaccuracies, scheduling conflicts, and limited visibility across distributed teams make it hard to coordinate workforce operations and make data-driven decisions.
keyFeatures: Employee Management — centralized employee database with roles, departments, profiles, and document storage
Attendance & Timesheet Management — real-time check-in/check-out tracking, digital timesheets, and attendance analytics
Shift Scheduling & Workforce Planning — smart scheduling, automated assignments, and conflict reduction
Task & Activity Tracking — task assignment with real-time progress monitoring across teams
HR & Communication Management — notice board, announcements, internal communication, leave management
Workforce Analytics & Reporting — dashboards for performance, attendance, and productivity insights
advancedFeatures: Real-time activity tracking across field teams
Automated shift conflict detection and resolution
businessBenefits: Improved workforce visibility and operational transparency
Reduced manual HR administration overhead
Improved payroll accuracy
Increased employee accountability
Optimized manpower utilization and team productivity
Reduced scheduling conflicts and faster HR coordination
Better employee engagement and strategic planning
useCases: Manufacturing: managing hundreds of workers from one system
Multi-location services: maintaining employee records across facilities
Construction: daily on-site worker attendance tracking
Healthcare: rotating-staff shift scheduling
Facility management: monitoring remote staff hours
Property management: tracking maintenance tasks
Field services: monitoring job progress in real time
Corporate: company-wide announcements and updates

products.name: CA POS
products.shortDescription: Customizable cloud point-of-sale platform unifying sales, payments, inventory, and reporting for retail, hospitality, and multi-outlet operations — Sell Faster. Serve Better.
products.overview: CA POS is a customizable point-of-sale system built for businesses that need flexibility beyond standard off-the-shelf retail tools. It unifies sales, payments, inventory, refunds, and reporting in a single cloud platform — designed for fast checkout, accurate stock control, and centralized oversight of multi-outlet and franchise operations.
products.businessProblem: Slow manual checkout, billing errors, fragmented payment tracking, inventory mismanagement, and lack of unified visibility across outlets prevent operators from running efficient, data-driven retail operations.
keyFeatures: Sales Management — fast sales processing, real-time transaction recording, invoice/receipt generation, multi-item billing
Payments Management — cash, card, and digital payments with partial/split payment support and reconciliation
Item & Inventory Management — centralized catalog, category and pricing control, real-time stock levels, automatic post-sale updates
Refund & Return Management — streamlined refund workflows, approval flows, and return documentation
Reporting & Business Analytics — daily/weekly/monthly sales dashboards, product performance and revenue tracking
Multi-Outlet & Operational Control — multi-branch management from a unified dashboard with role-based access and cloud sync
businessBenefits: Accelerated checkout and improved customer experience
Reduced billing and inventory errors
Greater payment transparency and reconciliation accuracy
Data-driven decisions on top-selling products and revenue
Simplified management of multi-location and franchise operations
useCases: Retail stores processing peak-hour transactions
Restaurants managing high-volume orders
Franchise chains controlling multiple outlets remotely
Electronics retailers managing warranty refunds
Pharmacies managing categorized inventory

products.name: CA Project
products.shortDescription: Centralized project management platform that helps teams plan, organize, track, and deliver projects from one workspace — Plan Better. Deliver Faster.
products.overview: CA Project is a project management platform that helps teams plan, organize, track, and successfully deliver projects from one centralized workspace. It supports project structuring, task allocation, team collaboration, resource planning, document management, and real-time progress reporting.
products.businessProblem: Scattered tools, inconsistent communication, missed deadlines, resource overallocation, and limited real-time insight into project performance prevent teams from delivering predictably.
keyFeatures: Project Planning & Management — project creation, milestones, deadlines, and timeline visualization on a centralized dashboard
Task Management & Assignment — task creation, priorities, status tracking, deadlines and reminders
Team Collaboration & Communication — shared workspace with comments, activity updates, and real-time communication
Resource & Workforce Allocation — resource assignment, workload distribution, capacity management, role-based responsibility
Progress Tracking & Reporting — real-time progress, performance dashboards, status reports, and custom analytics
Document & Workflow Management — project document storage, file sharing, version control, and workflow approvals
businessBenefits: Improved project organization and visibility
Reduced planning complexity
Stronger team accountability and productivity
Optimized resource utilization, preventing employee overload
Data-driven decision-making and earlier risk detection
useCases: IT companies running multiple software delivery projects in parallel
Construction firms coordinating sub-contractors and milestones
Marketing agencies managing client campaigns end-to-end
Consulting firms tracking engagements across teams
Engineering and architecture teams managing design workflows
Remote teams coordinating cross-timezone deliverables
